title: Huawei SFP-25G-LR-eKit, SFP28 optical module, Single-Mode, 10km, 25G, LC
description: Huawei SFP-25G-LR-eKit is a single-mode SFP28 module with a maximum throughput of 25Gbps , 1310nm wavelength and two LC connectors for connection up to a distance of 10km . The module has built-in digital diagnostic functions (DDMI) including monitoring of optical power, voltage, temperature or other key parameters
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP28 For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 25 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1310 Distance [km] 10 Transfer type 2-fiber Tx power [dBm] 7 up to 2 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 11.3 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 85 General Compatibility Universal
